acceptTerms: I read and agree to Terms and Conditions.
achPrestigeConsistency: Consistency compounds when it is tracked.
achPrestigeProtect: Protect the account. Earn the next level.
achPrestigeRevenge: Emotional re-entries stay out of the journal.
achievementSystemSub: Behavior-based milestones. No fake rankings, no vanity badges.
addTradesFirstAnalysis: Add trades first, then run analysis.
addTradesRevealEdge: Add trades to reveal your edge.
aiCloudNotConfigured: Cloud AI is not configured. Showing local YouTrader analysis.
aiCloudSignInRequired: Sign in to use cloud AI. Showing local YouTrader analysis.
aiCloudUnavailable: Cloud AI is unavailable. Showing local YouTrader analysis.
aiCoachEducationalDisclaimer: Educational process feedback only. Not financial advice.
aiDisciplineRiskOnly: This predicts discipline risk only, not market direction.
aiExecutionQualityFirst: Your first job today is execution quality.
aiFallbackAvoidSizeAfterEmotional: Avoid changing size after emotional trades
aiFallbackSessionStatsReview: Your risk and session stats can now be reviewed
aiInsightAvgLossLarger: Average loss is larger than average win.
aiInsightBuildingEvidence: You kept building journal evidence instead of trading blind.
aiInsightConsistentExecution: Execution stayed consistent across the sample.
aiInsightHealthyPf: Winners paid for losses with a healthy profit factor.
aiInsightNoUrgentRisk: No urgent risk warning. Keep size stable.
aiNotBuySellSignal: This is not a buy or sell signal. Manage risk first.
aiOpportunityScannerSub: Which sectors are attracting attention today.

aiTradeAnalysisPro: AI Trade Analysis is included in YouTrader Pro.
aiTradeAnalysisSub: Generate mistakes, strengths, and recommendations from the selected period.
aiUnavailableLocal: Cloud AI is unavailable right now. Generated a local journal analysis instead.
aiWeeklyReportSub: A compact weekly read on P&L, risk, behavior and next focus.
authChangeEmailSubtitle: We may send a confirmation link to your new address.
authEmailAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists. Try signing in.
authEmailCheckBody: We sent a confirmation email. Open it to verify your account, then return to YouTrader and sign in with your email and password.
authEmailNotConfirmed: Confirm your email first, then sign in with your password.
authPasswordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
authPasswordResetSent: Check your email for password reset instructions.
authRateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
authSecureNote: Your data stays synced securely with your YouTrader account.
authSignInFailedBody: Email or password is incorrect. Please try again.
authSignUpFailed: We couldn't create your account. Please try again.
authSubtitle: Stop guessing your metrics. Track every trade, analyze your performance, and let AI power your trading insights.
authTermsPrefix: By continuing you agree to our
backupText: Save a full backup of your trades and screenshots to iCloud Drive. If the app is deleted, import this file to restore your journal.
bestSetupLoss: Wait for cleaner context before sizing up.
bestSetupWin: Repeat this window with strict checklist quality.
breakdownMistakesHint: Mistakes: watch overtrading, weak notes and trades outside your best session.
calculatedPnlOutsideSafeRange: Calculated P&L is outside the safe range.
calendarAlertsUpdateFailed: Could not update economic calendar alerts. Please try again.
calendarIntelText: High impact events can expand volatility. Check ES/NQ/GOLD/OIL/BTC bias before trading.
checkTradeDetails: Check the trade details and try again.
cloudSignInNotConfigured: Cloud sign-in is not configured in this build.
cloudSyncError: Sync paused. Changes are saved locally and will retry.
cloudSyncText: Keep your journal on this device and export backups when needed.
coachActionConditionsClearBody: Trade only your best setups with fixed risk. The current plan is to preserve discipline and let expectancy work.
coachActionEvalDangerBody: Cut risk, protect remaining buffer, and take only checklist-perfect setups. The goal is survival before progress.
coachActionNoSizePressure: Do not increase size while the account is under pressure.
coachActionPropBody: Sync firm rules from Supabase, then select your evaluation account to unlock prop-aware coaching.
coachActionProtectPassBody: Your pass path is strong. Keep size stable, avoid overtrading after green days, and protect the account buffer.
coachActionSampleBody: Log each trade with entry time, exit time, symbol, result, and tags. The coach becomes useful once your journal has enough clean data.
coachActionStopToday: Stop trading today and switch to review-only mode.
coachActionTradeSmallerFallback: Keep size fixed, avoid chasing the pass target, and stop immediately if another loss reduces your daily buffer.
coachMissionClearConditions: Clear conditions, one leak to watch
compareYourselfSub: Anonymous benchmark architecture. User data stays private.
csvImportPro: CSV import is available in YouTrader Pro.
dailyBriefEmpty: Daily brief will appear after the worker publishes cached data.
dailyCoachActionDefault: Define entry, invalidation and target before tapping save.
dailyCoachActionEdge: Repeat your best setup, not every setup.
dailyCoachActionProtect: Review screenshots before adding another trade.
dailyCoachActionRisk: Cut size and wait for only A+ setups.
dailyCoachBodyDefault: Your journal has enough signal to keep the next trade simple.
dailyCoachBodyEdge: Recent trades are leaning green. Keep execution boring and avoid adding random size.
dailyCoachBodyEmpty: Log your first trade today. The coach will start reading your edge from real journal data.
dailyCoachBodyProtect: Today is red after multiple trades. The premium move is to stop digging.
dailyCoachBodyRisk: Your recent journal mentions tilt, FOMO, overtrading or revenge risk.
dailyPropReminderBody: Morning notification with your daily buffer and risk status.
deleteTradingDayBody: This will permanently delete every trade logged for this day. This action cannot be undone.
detectiveTitle: Your journal is exposing hidden patterns.
economicCalendarAlertsBody: Morning reminder to check high-impact events.
economicCalendarReminderBody: Check today's high-impact events before trading.
educationalDisclaimer: Educational analysis only. Not financial advice.
emailChangeSent: Check your inbox to confirm your new email address.
emailConfirmedBody: Your email is verified. Sign in with your password.
entryTimeInvalid: Entry time must look like 09:30 or 9:30 AM.
equityCurveSub: Live account story from your journal
evidenceMapSub: Every recommendation is tied back to session and calendar behavior.
exitTimeInvalid: Exit time must look like 09:45 or 9:45 AM.
fallbackMarketContextCaution: Educational market context only. Not financial advice.
featureExportProPaywall: Advanced exports are included in YouTrader Pro.
featureShareCardLimitFree: You've used your 30 free card exports this month. Upgrade to Pro for 100 monthly exports.
featureShareCardLimitPro: You've used your 100 card exports this month. More exports reset next month.
featureTradeImageLimit: You've saved 15 trade images on the free plan. Upgrade to Pro to keep adding screenshots, or continue journaling without more images.
firstInsightProCta: Pro unlocks Hidden Leaks, Revenge Alerts, Pattern Detective, and Prop Firm Coach.
fullExportsBenefit: Full Share P&L and Save Image exports
hiddenLeaksBenefit: Hidden Leaks, Revenge Alerts, Pattern Detective
hiddenLeaksHint: Highest-impact behavior patterns to fix first
importTradesBody: Import a CSV journal from another platform. Pro feature.
keepLoggingAchievement: Keep logging trades to unlock your first achievement.
keepLoggingBadges: Keep logging trades to unlock your first trader-status badge.
levelConsistentAction: Improve profit factor and green-day consistency.
levelConsistentPhrase: Your edge is forming. Protect risk and repeat the best setups.
levelElitePhrase: Your process is behaving like a professional desk.
levelFundedAction: Reduce drawdown and keep clean execution.
levelFundedPhrase: Your edge is strong enough to protect like funded capital.
levelRookieAction: Log more trades and control risk per setup.
levelRookiePhrase: Keep logging trades to reveal your edge.
localCoachAgentConsAction: Review the same metrics weekly before changing risk.
localCoachAgentConsFinding: Consistency is the core improvement lever.
localCoachAgentExecAction: Add setup tags like ORB, pullback, breakout, or reversal.
localCoachAgentExecEvidence: Strategy tags are analyzed when present.
localCoachAgentExecFinding: Execution quality improves with setup tags.
localCoachAgentPropAction: Protect daily and account buffers before chasing targets.
localCoachAgentPropFinding: Prop firm risk depends on buffer protection.
localCoachAgentPsychAction: Log mood consistently for the next 20 trades.
localCoachAgentPsychEvidence: Mood is included only when logged with trades.
localCoachAgentPsychFinding: Mood data can improve future analysis.
localCoachAgentRiskAction: Keep size fixed until drawdown stabilizes.
localCoachAgentStreakAction: No size increase after a loss.
localCoachAgentStreakFinding: Streak behavior needs a hard rule.
localCoachBlindSpotActionFilter: Use smaller size in {{session}} until the data improves.
localCoachBlindSpotActionNegExp: Cut size and review every loss before the next live session.
localCoachBlindSpotTitleNegExp: Negative expectancy is the main leak
localCoachBlindSpotWhy: This pattern affects consistency and can pressure prop firm drawdown limits if repeated.
localCoachDisclaimer: Educational trading journal feedback only. This is not financial advice and does not predict market outcomes.
localCoachMistake1ExplainFilter: Your data shows room to filter weaker setups before entry.
localCoachMistake1ExplainLowPf: Losses are currently larger than wins. Reduce size until the edge stabilizes.
localCoachMistake1Fix: Only take setups that match your written checklist for the next 10 trades.
localCoachMistake2Evidence: Expectancy is {{exp}} and weakest session is {{session}}.
localCoachMistake2ExplainNegExp: Average result per trade is negative. Focus on risk per trade and stop discipline.
localCoachMistake2ExplainWeak: {{session}} has the weakest performance profile in this period.
localCoachMistake2Fix: Reduce size during {{session}} until the sample improves.
localCoachMistake3Evidence: Average loss streak is {{streak}} and weakest day is {{day}}.
localCoachMistake3ExplainStreak: Multiple loss streaks appear in this period. Add a hard pause rule after two losses.
localCoachMistake3ExplainWeakDay: {{day}} deserves reduced size or stricter setup selection.
localCoachMistake3Fix: Add a hard pause after two losses or after one rule-breaking trade.
localCoachNextRule: For the next session, take only checklist-perfect setups and stop after two losses.
localCoachPatternExpActionNeg: Do not scale risk until expectancy turns positive.
localCoachPatternExpActionPos: Protect the current process and avoid size jumps.
localCoachPatternWeakDayAction: Lower risk or stop earlier on {{day}}.
localCoachPatternWeakDayEvidence: {{day}} is the weakest day in your current breakdown.
localCoachPatternWeakSessionAction: Reduce activity in {{session}} or require A+ setups only.
localCoachPatternWeakSessionEvidence: {{session}} has the weakest net P&L in the current period.
localCoachRec1Action: After two consecutive losses, stop trading or switch to review-only mode.
localCoachRec1Why: Loss streaks are where many prop firm rule breaches start.
localCoachRec2Action: Prioritize {{session}} and reduce size during weaker sessions.
localCoachRec3Action: Track expectancy, profit factor, and drawdown every weekend before increasing size.
localCoachRec3Why: Scaling should follow stable execution, not one strong day.
localCoachStrength1ExplainBuilding: You have enough data to identify what needs improvement next.
localCoachStrength1ExplainWr: Win rate is {{wr}}%, which gives you a base to refine risk/reward.
localCoachStrength1HowTo: Keep the same entry quality and improve loss size control.
localCoachStrength2ExplainPosExp: Average result is {{exp}} per trade in this period.
localCoachStrength2ExplainRisk: The journal is already showing where risk needs to be tightened.
localCoachStrength2HowTo: Do not increase size until this stays stable across a larger sample.
localCoachStrength3Evidence: {{session}} leads your session breakdown by net P&L.
localCoachStrength3Explain: {{session}} is currently your strongest session by net P&L.
localCoachSummary: Generated locally from your journal statistics because cloud AI analysis was unavailable.

madeByTraders: MADE BY A TRADER, FOR TRADERS

marketHeadlinesSub: Pull to refresh. Cached news appears here when Supabase or the public fallback returns headlines.

mediaPreservedRetry: Your existing trade data was preserved. Please try again.
monthlyPdfPreviewMessage: Free includes 1 watermarked monthly PDF preview per month. Pro unlocks unlimited premium reports.
moreTradeHistoryNeeded: More trade history is needed before patterns can be detected.
noEventsThisDay: No scheduled events for this day yet.
noEventsThisDaySub: Tap Refresh to pull the latest live calendar data. If the provider has not published events for this date, YouTrader will leave the day empty instead of showing demo events.
noTradesFoundCsv: No trades found. Use header row: date, symbol, direction, pnl (optional: entry, exit, contracts, notes).
notificationsCalendarPermission: Allow notifications to receive economic calendar alerts.
notificationsRiskPermission: Allow notifications to receive risk alerts.
paidAiPaywall: Unlock Pro to see exactly which session, setup, and behavior is costing you money.
paywallPreviewSub: Your journal stays free. Pro unlocks AI coaching, prop firm protection, hidden leaks, advanced stats, media notes, import/export, full news, and the full economic calendar.
pnlOutsideSafeRange: P&L is outside the safe range.

premiumBenefit2: Pass Probability, Revenge Trading alerts, Hidden Leaks, and Pattern Prediction

premiumBenefit6: Screenshots, photos, and voice notes for trade reviews
premiumBenefit7: Full real-time Market Pulse news feed
premiumBenefit8: Full economic calendar beyond today's preview
premiumLockedText: Your manual journal stays free. Pro unlocks AI coaching, prop firm protection, advanced analytics, media notes, import/export, full news, and the full economic calendar.
proActiveBody: All premium analytics, AI tools, news, calendar, import, and export features are unlocked.
proLockedBody: Unlock AI analysis, full analytics, Market Pulse news, CSV import, and premium journal tools.
proToolsBenefit: Prop Firm Coach, exports, sync, and monthly reports
propCustomFirmOverrides: Custom firm — user overrides apply in Settings.
propEntryHint: Tap for prop firm rules & daily buffer
propFirmRiskAssistantSub: Unified risk engine fed into Weekly Report, Daily Mission, DNA, Coach and achievements.
propNoRuleWarnings: No active rule warnings. Keep discipline steady.
propSelectEvalAccount: Select your evaluation account to unlock prop-aware risk coaching.
propSyncActivate: Sync firm rules from Supabase to activate the Prop Firm Risk Assistant.
propTemplateHintLive: Rules, buffers and contract plan update live
propTemplatesLoadHint: Firm templates load from Supabase. Connect and reopen AI Analytics to sync rules.
propTrailingTighteningBody: Losses reduce remaining room immediately on trailing accounts.
propUpgradeProHint: Upgrade to YouTrader Pro for full Prop Firm Risk Assistant.
purchaseDifferentProduct: Purchase completed for a different product. Please contact support.
purchaseUnreadable: Purchase completed, but the subscription is not readable yet. Tap Restore Purchases.
radarConsistencyExp: Green day rate plus daily P&L stability.
radarConsistencyExpShort: Green-day quality plus daily P&L stability.
radarProfitFactorExp: Gross wins divided by gross losses.
radarRecoveryExp: Net P&L divided by max drawdown.
radarRewardRiskExp: Average win size divided by average loss size.
radarRiskCtrlExp: Drawdown control relative to total performance and risk buffer.
radarRiskExp: How well your drawdown is controlled relative to current profit and buffer.
radarUnlockMessage: Pro unlocks Profit Factor, Consistency, Recovery, strengths, and weakest-area analysis in your full Trading Radar.
radarWinRateExp: Percentage of closed trades that finished green.
restoreDone: Backup restored. Restart the app to reload your journal.
restoreFailedTryAgain: Could not restore purchases. Please try again.
restoreUnavailable: Subscriptions are not available in this build. Please update the app from the App Store.
riskAlertsBody: Daily risk coach reminder before trading.
riskCoachReminderBody: Review your prop firm risk status before trading.
screenshotLimitMessage: Free plan allows 3 screenshots per month. Pro unlocks media notes for every setup.
screenshotLimitTrade: Free plan allows one screenshot per trade. Remove the current image first to replace it.
securityCsvTooLarge: CSV is too large. Import a smaller file.
securityCsvTooManyRows: CSV has too many rows. Split the import into several files.
securityDuplicateRequest: This request was already processed. It was not sent again.
securityInvalidTrade: Check the trade fields — some data looks invalid.
securityInvalidUpload: The file is not valid for type or size.
securityRateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
securitySafeFailure: Could not complete the action. Please try again.

selectPropTemplatePass: Select a prop firm template to unlock pass-path coaching.

shareCardLimitNote: Free includes {{free}} saved or shared cards per month. Pro includes {{pro}}.
shareCardExportFailed: Share card couldn't be created. Please try again.
signInUnavailableBody: Cloud sign-in is not available in this build. You can still use the journal on this device.
subDisclosure: Payment is charged to your Apple ID at confirmation of purchase. Subscription automatically renews unless canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Your account is charged for renewal within 24 hours before the current period ends. Manage or cancel in App Store account settings.
subsTemporarilyUnavailable: Subscriptions are temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
subsUnableToLoad: Unable to load subscriptions right now. Try again in a moment.
syncFirmTemplates: Sync firm templates from Supabase to activate prop-firm-aware coaching.
tapDay: Tap any day to add a trade
termsText: YouTrader is an educational journaling and market-information tool. It is not financial, investment, legal, tax or trading advice. You are fully responsible for all trading decisions, risk, losses and gains. YouTrader does not guarantee profits, market outcomes, data accuracy or uninterrupted service.
traderStatusShareSub: Share-worthy badges from real journal data
traderStatusSub: Who have you become as a trader?
unlockProRevealPatterns: Unlock Pro to reveal deeper pattern detection.
unlockProSeeImprovement: Unlock Pro to see the highest-impact improvement.
watchlistRiskScannerSub: Scan recent news risk for your symbols.
youAreImprovingSub: Real comparison only. If performance declines, the card says so.
notificationsSmartSub: Journaling, risk, and discipline reminders — not trading signals.
notificationsProLockedBody: Smart alerts are part of YouTrader Pro. Upgrade to enable advanced risk and performance reminders.
notificationsMasterSub: Five high-value alert groups powered by the Smart Alert Engine.
notificationsMasterSmartCoachBody: AI reminders based on your trading behavior, discipline, and journal activity.
notificationsMasterPerformanceInsightsBo: Weekly performance and AI trading insights.
notificationsMasterDailyBriefBody: Morning summary with account status, today's events, and reminders.
notificationsPermissionDenied: Allow notifications in iOS Settings to receive reminders.
notificationsPrefDailyJournalBody: Remind you to log today's trades before the session fades.
notificationsPrefInactivityBody: Nudge you if no trades were logged for several days.
notificationsPrefEconomicCalendarBody: 30-minute heads-up for CPI, FOMC, and NFP when calendar data is available.
notificationsPrefSmartRiskBody: Combined daily loss limit warnings for active risk tracking.
notificationsPrefDailyLossLimitBody: Alert when you approach or reach your configured daily loss limit.
notificationsPrefPropFirmBufferBody: Alert when your prop firm buffer gets tight.
notificationsPrefWinRateDropBody: Weekly reminder if win rate drops meaningfully vs the prior week.
notificationsPrefOvertradingBody: Alert when today's trade count is unusually high vs your average.
notificationsPrefRevengeTradingBody: Alert after multiple losing trades in a row today.
notificationsPrefConsistencyBody: Reminder to add notes and context while trades are still fresh.
notificationsPrefWeeklyReviewBody: Sunday reminder to review stats, risk, and setups.
notificationsPrefAiCoachBody: Reminder when enough journal data exists for a new AI review.
notificationsPrefProfitProtectionBody: Alert if you give back a large share of today's green P&L.
notificationsPrefBestSetupBody: Reminder before your historically strongest session window.
notificationsAlertMissedJournalBody: Don't let today's trades disappear from memory. Log them while they're fresh.
notificationsAlertInactivityBody: You haven't logged a trade in 5 days. Keep your data clean before your next session.
notificationsAlertDailyLossWarningBody: You're close to your daily risk limit. Review your plan before taking another trade.
notificationsAlertDailyLossReachedBody: Your daily loss limit has been reached. Review your risk before continuing.
notificationsAlertPropFirmBufferBody: Your buffer is getting tight. Check your risk status before the next trade.
notificationsAlertCpiBody: High-impact news is coming up. Check your risk plan before trading.
notificationsAlertFomcBody: FOMC can move markets fast. Review your risk settings before trading.
notificationsAlertNfpBody: High-impact labor data is coming soon. Review your plan before trading.
notificationsAlertWinRateDropBody: Your win rate dropped this week. Review your stats before the next session.
notificationsAlertOvertradingBody: You're trading more than usual today. Pause and review your setup quality.
notificationsAlertRevengeTradingBody: You've logged multiple losses in a row. Take a pause before the next decision.
notificationsAlertConsistencyBody: Your journal is missing context on some trades. Add notes while the session is fresh.
notificationsAlertWeeklyReviewBody: Your week is ready to review. Check your stats, risk, and best setup.
notificationsAlertAiCoachBody: Your AI Coach has enough data for a new performance review.
notificationsAlertProfitProtectionBody: You gave back part of today's profits. Review whether it's time to protect the day.
notificationsAlertBestSetupBody: Your data shows when you perform best. Review your top setup before trading.
